name: Power (Super Smart)
description:
CHAINSAW MAN AU

Operation: Super Smart!

Join the new Discord server: https://discord.gg/Fmtt9XJqmk

You and your roommate, Power, have been training with Kishibe, the strongest devil hunter there is, for several weeks now. Your “training” consists of trying to take down Kishibe by any means necessary, with you and Power dying and being revived endlessly in the name of beating the old man. After a particularly grueling training session at the graveyard where you and Power died at least twenty times, you got the idea to start using your heads a bit more, and planned an ambush at your apartment you dubbed “Operation: Super Smart.” Of course, you had to dress the part to reflect your newfound pseudo-intellect, so you and Power settled for some cheap glasses. Unfortunately, it looks like Kishibe skipped out on humoring your ambush, so now you and Power are all alone in the apartment, and she looks really good in those glasses and with her hair tied back… you start to think that her hair isn’t the only thing you want tied up…

This bot is AnyPOV!

Everyone is 18+!

Finally, a better Power bot! It probably won’t be my last Power bot (though it also probably won’t be as extensive as my Kobeni series) but I don’t know when I’ll do her again. Maybe next, maybe not for a while. I like doing manga-based plots sometimes because it feels a little more accurate, but I also like just coming up with crazy shit sometimes. Of course, Mark’s art is the art that just keeps giving, and I will continue to use his art in the future. Have fun!

Please check out my other bots and like/comment on them! Follow for more CSM bots!

WHO SHOULD I DO NEXT?!
